Djamé Seddah

Research in NLP, Robust Language Modeling, LLM and Model Safety, Low Ressource Languages and Specialized domains

Home Research People Publications Models and Datasets Teaching Contact

Collaborations

Current collaborations

  • LightOn — work on understanding extremely large language models, specialized multimodal model building and evaluation. (BPI Scribe + CIFRE Thesis, Maxence Lasbordes)
  • Meta - Work on Agentic LLMs, reasoning, planning. (CIFRE Thesis, Romain Froger)
  • Thales - Work on LLM Safety, focus on intentional biases transmission. (CIFRE Thesis, Lisa Bouger)
  • Dr. Tatjana Scheffler with Melce Husunbeyi (PhD student). Work on multimodal fact checking, inclusion of knowlege graph into discriminative LLMs.
  • Pr. Michelangelo Ceci with Francesco Benedetti (PhD student). Cross-domain online radicalisation detection, syntethic network generation, socio-demographic biases analysis.

Past collaborations

  • AXA Group / AXA Research — bertology and interpretability for black-box NLP models.
  • ReciTAL.ai — synthetic data augmentation for multilingual question answering.
  • QuantCube / Q3 Technology — multilingual NLP, fact-checking, and information quality evaluation.
  • Fortia Financial Services, now Outscale — preprocessing pipelines and evaluation datasets for semantic analysis.
  • Davi — French NLP parsing pipelines and unsupervised clustering for domain adaptation.

© Djamé Seddah — 2026 · Last updated: April 2026
